title: pittosporum gayanum
intro: Pittosporum gayanum, also known as the Kauri or New Zealand laurel, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The leaves and bark of Pittosporum gayanum are used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
